subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn Khattabi, I found no title more wondrous and exalted than this with which to extol thee, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین خطابی ابدع و اشرف از این عنوان نیافتم تا ترا بان بستایم زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @poems and quotation from poetry
